name: Tropical Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange cooked sweet potatoes in a well-buttered rectangular baking dish.
2. Bring cream of coconut to a boil; lower heat and reduce the cream to two-thirds of its original volume.
3. Pour the hot cream of coconut over the prepared sweet potatoes; top with flaked coconut.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F until bubbly, about 30 minutes.
